title: pecteilis praetermissa
intro: Pecteilis praetermissa, also known as the Chinese orchid or yellow orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family. It is primarily used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Pecteilis praetermissa include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and sore throats, and soothing digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the roots and flowers of Pecteilis praetermissa are often decocted in water to make teas or infusions, or dried to make powder for consumption.
